---
title: "20 Seconds of Thinking, 100,000× More Data"
description: "Noam Brown at TED AI: a poker bot thinking for 20 seconds matched scaling the model 100,000× and training it 100,000× longer."
author: "synesis"
date: "2024-11-14"
categories: [AI, generative AI, LLMs, reasoning, OpenAI, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

!["OpenAI scientist Noam Brown stuns TED AI Conference: '20 seconds of thinking worth 100,000x more data'." Image: VentureBeat (via LinkedIn). ([Source](https://venturebeat.com/ai/openai-scientist-noam-brown-stuns-ted-ai-conference-20-seconds-of-thinking-worth-100000x-more-data/))](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

"It turned out that having a bot think for just 20 seconds in a hand of poker got the same boosting performance as scaling up the model by 100,000x and training it for 100,000 times longer." -- Noam Brown

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_openai-scientist-noam-brown-stuns-ted-ai-activity-7263039298826842113-m4Yt).*
